categories.label: Cat Families
categories.description: Points from groups of 3+ adjacent same-colored cats (8/11/15/20 points for 3/4/5/6+ cats)

categories.label: Rare Treasures
categories.description: Victory points from rare treasure tiles collected

categories.label: Public Lessons
categories.description: Points scored from shared public lesson card objectives

categories.label: Private Lessons
categories.description: Points scored from secret private lesson card objectives

categories.label: Uncovered Rooms
categories.description: Each room on your boat not completely filled with tiles loses 5 points

categories.label: Visible Rats
categories.description: Each visible rat symbol on your boat not covered by tiles loses 1 point

win_condition: Player with the highest total score wins. Tiebreaker: most cat tiles on your boat.
